channel.title: Linux on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on My Linux Journey

item.title: How to Install Docker on Void Linux Step by Step
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: How to Install Docker on Void Linux

item.title: Fix: modprobe FATAL Module dm_mod Not Found in Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Encountering ‘modprobe: FATAL: Module dm_mod not found in directory /lib/modules/…’ on Void Linux? This guide walks you through chrooting from a live ISO and rebuilding your initramfs and kernel hooks with xbps-reconfigure.

item.title: Split Large File for FAT32 USB - Linux Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to splitting large files into smaller chunks for FAT32 USB transfer. Uses split command to create 4GB parts and cat to rejoin them.

item.title: Mount Android Phone on Linux - File Transfer Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to mounting Android phone on Linux for file transfer. Covers MTP protocol, USB debugging mode, and troubleshooting mount point errors.

item.title: Install CUPS on Void Linux - Printer Setup Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing CUPS on Void Linux. Covers installation via XBPS, runit service configuration, web interface access, and printer management.

item.title: Linux System Information Commands - Complete Reference
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete reference for Linux system information commands. Learn to use lscpu, free, df, lsblk, lspci, ip, and other tools for monitoring.

item.title: FFmpeg Screen Recording - Command Breakdown
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete breakdown of FFmpeg screen recording commands. Covers video capture, pulse/alsa audio input, and encoding options for Linux.

item.title: FFmpeg Screen Recording Script - Linux Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to FFmpeg screen recording on Linux. Script breakdown for capturing desktop, microphone, and audio with real-time monitoring.

item.title: Install Bliss OS on Linux: Step-by-Step GRUB Guide (2025)
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Manual installation guide for Bliss OS on Linux. Covers ISO download, GRUB configuration, data partition setup, kernel boot parameters, and common troubleshooting steps.

item.title: Blog
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive blog posts section with tested guides on Linux administration, distro installations, virtualization, Android custom ROMs, development tools, and productivity tips.

item.title: Linux Knowledge Base
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Your complete Linux knowledge base with tutorials on system administration, QEMU virtualization, Void Linux, Alpine Linux, networking, iptables, shell scripting, and Linux kernel concepts.

item.title: Tutorials - Linux, Android & Development Guides
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive tutorials section with tested guides on Linux administration, distro installations, virtualization, Android custom ROMs, development tools, and productivity tips.
